# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Game

The `textual` App and the `myiagi` console-script entry point.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [run](run.qmd#myiagi_widget.app.run) | Parse CLI args, load/init the persisted progress file, and launch the game. |

## Expression generator

Builds the random Python expression each round is generated from.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [get_expression](get_expression.qmd#myiagi_widget.expressions.get_expression) | Build a random expression tree and stringify it. |
| [randomExpression](randomExpression.qmd#myiagi_widget.expressions.randomExpression) | Retry ``_randomExpression`` until it yields a syntactically valid, |
